title: Manual Feed Item Append
description: Inspect the manual/local signal intake path added to the feed primitive.
prompt: Inspect the manual feed item append surface. Explain what command/API appends a local item, how dedupe works at a high level, and how this differs from polling RSS or Atom. Do not mutate feed state and do not use codex exec.

checklist: Inspect docs and tests for `feed item append` rather than appending a real item.
